/usr/bin/cc -fPIC "-Wl,-rpath,\$ORIGIN" -shared -Wl,-soname,libowl_song.so -o /home/ganjb/project/ElfOwl/example/build/native/libowl_song.so CMakeFiles/owl_song.dir/native/owl_song.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ganjb/project/ElfOwl/example/build/native /home/ganjb/project/ElfOwl/example/build/native/libowl_leaf.so /home/ganjb/project/ElfOwl/example/build/native/libowl_seed.so -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/ganjb/project/ElfOwl/example/build/native
